description: Letter fragment in Judaeo-Arabic. Mentions: a 'moshav' (court session?) on Thursday; Rabbi Yiṣḥaq; a dispute over expenses accrued over 9 months, and sums of 8 dinars and 10 dinars, deposits, and witnesses; a letter or document from Abū l-Faḍl from Damascus, and a letter or document from Abū ʿAlī b. Sālim; mentions the Rayyis; greetings at the end. AA. ASE.
